name: summit
description: Connect Codex to meeting notes stored locally in Summit AI Notes for macOS.

interface.shortDescription: Work with your local Summit meeting notes.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Summit AI Notes running on this Mac. Search and work with local meeting transcripts, summaries, and action items through Summit's local MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Find my recent Summit meeting notes.
Summarize the action items from my latest meeting.
Search my Summit transcripts for a topic.
